title: chrysanthemum microphyllum
intro: Chrysanthemum microphyllum, also known as Small-flowered Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum microphyllum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Chrysanthemum microphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
